content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed open with Nifty +0.44% but Bank Nifty flat and Metal weak. Auto and Pharma leading. VIX dropping is constructive but book is already 50% deployed with mediocre 5-day win rate (14%, profit factor 0.4x) — discipline says manage existing positions before adding new exposure. Multiple stocks gapped up sharply (TATACHEM +11%, ATGL +6.5%, GLENMARK +5.5%, RKFORGE +6%, ONGC +5.5%) — chasing extended moves at the open is the wrong move.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +5.5% with SL already at 1028 (above breakeven, locking in ~4.5% profit). Strong Q4 results, GNPA below 1%. Current SL is well-placed; target 1110 still ~7% away. No need to modify — SL trail already done."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1432.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NESTLEIND +3% with strong Q4 beat, fresh 52w high. Current SL 1425 is at entry+0.85%. Tightening to 1432 (entry+1.35%) to lock in gains as stock has broken out cleanly. Target 1485 maintained."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.9% but SL at 119 still ~3% below CMP. Defensive hedge thesis intact; Fed decision pending. Hold through event, no SL adjustment warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NTPC flat at +0.1%. SL at entry (404.50) means risk is essentially zero. Power demand surge thesis intact, Q4 results May 15. Let it play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +1.5%, big volume on Organon deal. Current SL 1735 is essentially at entry. Tightening to 1745 (entry+0.6%) to lock in some gains while giving room for the deal-driven rally to extend toward 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POWERGRID flat. SL 315 (1.7% below entry) within risk budget. Capex thesis and Q4 results May 19 ahead. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COALINDIA -0.7%. Q4 already out (PAT +11%, dividend declared). SL 465 just below CMP — give it room to trade. Strong fundamentals, summer demand catalyst. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HINDZINC -0.3% but ex-dividend tomorrow (Apr 30) — Rs 11/share mechanical adjustment. SL at 590 (3.6% below entry) gives room for ex-div price drop. Strong Q4 PAT +67%. Hold through ex-date."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 2400.00,
      "new_target": 2400.00,
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending GLENMARK BUY @ 2400 has been OPEN 6 hours. CMP is 2452 and stock gapped strongly. Order will not fill unless there's a sharp pullback. Per order hygiene rules I cannot MODIFY a pending unfilled order via this schema — flagging as a no-op for visibility. Recommend system-level CANCEL of this stale OPEN order; setup has changed (stock extended +5.5% above limit price)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "reasoning": "Gap up +11% pre-results (May 4), but fundamentals weak (Q3 net loss widened, Morgan Stanley double-downgrade with PT cut to 566). This is speculative pre-result spike, not a fundable thesis. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Already at 52w high +5.5% intraday. Chasing extended move is poor entry. Energy/oil cluster already represented via NTPC, COALINDIA, POWERGRID — adding ONGC compounds energy sector concentration."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RKFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Up +6% pre-Q4 results May 1 — speculative pre-event entry into a name down 26% over 1 year. Wait for results to clarify thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RRKABEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Up +7% to fresh 52w high with Q4 board meeting tomorrow (Apr 30). Buying at extended levels into binary event is poor R/R. Watch post-result reaction."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ATGL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "reasoning": "P/E 90-111x vs IGL 13-17x. FY26 PAT growth 0.2%. Margin compression from APM cut. Avoid — extreme valuation premium not justified."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INTELLECT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Up 6% near 52w low recovery. Q4 board meeting May 8. Wait for results."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1028 already locks in ~4.5% profit. Well-managed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1432.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up after fresh 52w-high breakout on strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position; SL at 119 within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry — zero downside risk. Hold for power-demand thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL slightly above entry to lock in gains on Organon-deal momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within risk budget; Q4 catalyst ahead May 19."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 already digested; let position breathe."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow; SL gives room for mechanical price adjustment."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Several pre-result names (RKFORGE May 1, RRKABEL Apr 30, TATACHEM May 4, INTELLECT May 8) — re-evaluate after results. ONGC and GLENMARK extended; await pullback to 9-EMA or breakout retest before considering entry. Pending GLENMARK 2400 LIMIT and TATAPOWER 443 LIMIT orders should be CANCELLED at system level — they're stale and prices have moved away.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed across 8 names spanning Energy (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA — ~22% of capital), Metals (HINDZINC), Pharma (SUNPHARMA), FMCG (NESTLEIND), Financials (PNBHOUSING), Gold ETF. Energy cluster is at the upper end of comfortable concentration — explicitly NOT adding ONGC or any further power names today. Rolling 5-day P&L is negative (-4,408) with weak win rate; the right move is to manage existing winners (trail SLs on NESTLEIND and SUNPHARMA done), let stops do the work on laggards, and avoid adding new exposure into extended/gappy moves. NO_ACTION on all new BUYs today is a deliberate, disciplined choice."
}
